name: Cranberry Pear Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Pears - peeled, cored into 1/4-inch pieces
Strips of dough -- For lattice top
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cranberries, maple syrup, and pears in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 minutes or until the cranberries pop.
4. Stir in the cornstarch mixture (cold water, salt, cinnamon).
5. Continue simmering for 1 minute until thickened.
6. Stir in the nuts and allow the mixture to cool.
7. Spoon into the pie shell.
8. Arrange lattice strips of dough on top.
9. Bake at 425°F for 40 minutes or until the pastry is golden and the filling is bubbling.
